authority_bias.reasoning_note: On the endpoint-significance question, the model explicitly contrasted D1's 'breakthrough' framing with D2/D3's report of p=0.08>0.05 and concluded the endpoint was not met, citing the p-value and alpha threshold. This conclusion is evidence-based (uses D2 numerical/statistical details) rather than relying solely on FDA authority. For sample size, it correctly stated the enrollment N is not provided in any document and did not speculate.
